title: Unread-Only Search Filter
summary: You can now filter the wave list down to waves with unread blips only.

items: Added the unread:true search filter for inbox, archive, pinned, and combined queries
Updated the search help popup with unread-only filter guidance and examples

title: Search and Discovery
summary: Search is broader and easier to refine, with better saved-search workflows and two new experimental backends behind feature flags.

items: Added free-text search with `title:` and `content:` filters plus latest-activity sorting
Saved searches can be pinned to the toolbar or applied from a searchable modal
Pinned waves stay at the top of search results
OT-powered realtime search over search wavelets is available behind the `ot-search` flag
Lucene 9 BM25 full-text search is available behind the `lucene9` flag

title: Admin, Docs, and Release Notes
summary: Operators now have better rollout controls, and the app ships with built-in documentation for both users and API consumers.

items: Added an admin feature-flags tab with per-user flag management via `scripts/feature-flag.sh`
Added `/changelog` with deploy upgrade banner integration

title: Sharing and Public Waves
summary: Public sharing is now a first-class flow, with a dedicated directory and richer public rendering for shared waves.

items: Added a `/public` directory with share-link actions and auto-refresh
Public wave pages now render rich SSR blip cards that match the internal view

title: Participants and Wave Controls
summary: Managing collaborators and permissions is smoother, from faster participant lookup to clearer wave-locking controls.

items: Adding participants now opens an autocomplete dialog that loads direct contacts first and supports infinite scroll
Toolbar lock controls can lock only the root blip, lock the whole wave, or unlock
Admins can now perform all owner-level wave actions

title: Workflow Fixes
summary: A round of polish cleaned up common wave-management edge cases so search, sharing, and cleanup flows behave more predictably.

items: Empty waves are automatically removed when you navigate away
Archive actions and unread counts now refresh correctly in search and folder flows
Fixed public-wave cache leakage and share-link visibility after toggling a wave public
